task.json description (line 5) specifies exact sender email. verifier.py line 93 compares sender_email case-insensitively. export_result.sh line 22 retrieves template_sender_email from database.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic e-commerce task using Magento Open Source. The task requires configuring newsletter infrastructure: setting 'Allow Guest Subscription' to Yes and 'Need to Confirm' to No in Stores > Configuration > Customers > Newsletter. A newsletter template named 'Holiday Collection 2024' must be created with subject 'Discover Our Holiday Collection - Exclusive Early Access', sender name 'NestWell Home', sender email 'newsletter@nestwell-home.com', and HTML content containing h1, p, and li tags. Five target customers (alice.johnson@example.com, bob.smith@example.com, carol.williams@example.com, david.brown@example.com, emma.davis@example.com) must be subscribed to the newsletter. All metadata values are internally consistent across task definition, setup scripts, export scripts, and verification logic.
